mapper.select: SELECT FLOOR(SUM(gen_val) / 1000) as gen_val FROM tb_pv_gen where site_id = #{siteId} AND YEAR(std_date) = YEAR(NOW()) AND MONTH(std_date) = MONTH(NOW())

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(std_date, '%Y%m%d') AS std_date, FLOOR(sum(gen_val) / 1000) AS gen_val FROM tb_pv_gen WHERE site_id = #{siteId} AND YEAR(std_date) = YEAR(NOW()) AND MONTH(std_date) = MONTH(NOW()) GROUP BY YEAR(std_date), MONTH(std_date), DAY(std_date)
SELECT FLOOR(SUM(gen_val) / 1000) as gen_val FROM tb_pv_gen where site_id = #{siteId} AND YEAR(std_date) = YEAR(NOW() - INTERVAL 1 MONTH) AND MONTH(std_date) = MONTH(NOW() - INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
SELECT FLOOR(SUM(gen_val) / 1000) as gen_val FROM tb_pv_gen where site_id = #{siteId} AND YEAR(std_date) = YEAR(NOW())
SELECT MIN(std_date) as std_date, FLOOR(SUM(gen_val) / 1000) as gen_val FROM tb_pv_gen WHERE site_id = #{siteId} AND YEAR(std_date) = YEAR(NOW()) GROUP BY YEAR(std_date), MONTH(std_date)
SELECT FLOOR(SUM(gen_val) / 1000) as gen_val FROM tb_pv_gen where site_id = #{siteId} AND YEAR(std_date) = YEAR(NOW() - INTERVAL 1 YEAR)

SELECT A.device_id, A.gen_val / 1000 AS gen_val FROM tb_pv_gen AS A, ( SELECT MAX(std_date) AS std_date FROM ewpsp.tb_pv_gen WHERE site_id = #{siteId} ) AS B WHERE site_id = #{siteId} AND A.std_date = B.std_date GROUP BY A.device_id
